# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Validate input
        run: |
          if [[ -z "$BUILD_SCRIPT" || -z "$DEPLOY_COMMAND" ]]; then
            echo "Error: BUILD_SCRIPT and DEPLOY_COMMAND must be provided."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run build script
        env:
          BUILD_SCRIPT: ${{ secrets.BUILD_SCRIPT }}
        run: |
          if [[ ! "$BUILD_SCRIPT" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$ ]]; then
            echo "Error: Invalid characters in BUILD_SCRIPT."
            exit 1
          fi
          bash "$BUILD_SCRIPT"

      - name: Run deploy command
        env:
          DEPLOY_COMMAND: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_COMMAND }}
        run: |
          if [[ ! "$DEPLOY_COMMAND" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$ ]]; then
            echo "Error: Invalid characters in DEPLOY_COMMAND."
            exit 1
          fi
          bash -c "$DEPLOY_COMMAND"

      - name: Clean up
        run: |
          echo "Cleaning up sensitive data..."
          unset BUILD_SCRIPT
          unset DEPLOY_COMMAND
